qa_pairs.question: Where can I find an advisory and tools from the CERN Computer Security group regarding Spectre and Meltdown?
qa_pairs.answer: An advisory and tools from the CERN Computer Security group related to Spectre and Meltdown are available at `https://security.web.cern.ch/security/advisories/spectre-meltdown/spectre-meltdown.shtml`.

qa_pairs.question: Which resource offers guidance on controlling the performance impact of microcode and security patches for CVE-2017-5754, CVE-2017-5715, and CVE-2017-5753 using Red Hat Enterprise Linux Tunables?
qa_pairs.answer: You can find guidance on controlling the performance impact of microcode and security patches for CVE-2017-5754, CVE-2017-5715, and CVE-2017-5753 using Red Hat Enterprise Linux Tunables at `https://access.redhat.com/articles/3311301`.

qa_pairs.question: Is there a tool available from Red Hat for detecting Spectre and Meltdown?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, Red Hat provides a Spectre and Meltdown detector tool, accessible at `https://access.redhat.com/labs/speculativeexecution/`.

qa_pairs.question: Where can I find information about the effect of Meltdown and Spectre patches on the performance of HPC applications?
qa_pairs.answer: Information regarding the effect of Meltdown and Spectre patches on the performance of HPC applications is available in a PDF document at `https://arxiv.org/pdf/1801.04329.pdf`.
